watchlist: Use my saved TradingView watchlist called X
methodology: One primary framework: OTE Entry using Killshot (70.5% fibonacci level). HTF S&D zones used as confluence only — not a separate entry framework. Do not mix entry logic.

timeframe_hierarchy.Daily: Bias (trend direction) read directly from PxD Trend Engine v20 dashboard
timeframe_hierarchy.4H: Market timing, swing detection, confluence confirmation, and Killshot entry execution

indecisive.body_percent: 50% or less of total candle range (high to low)
indecisive.implication: Balance between supply and demand — orders being accumulated

decisive.body_percent: More than 50% of total candle range
decisive.implication: Institutional activity — one side consuming orders

explosive.body_percent: More than 70% of total candle range AND abnormally bigger than surrounding candles

location_analysis.method: Switch to Daily, read data_get_pine_labels(study_filter='PxD Toolkit') and filter for HH and LL labels. Identify the most recent HH (swing high) and most recent LL (swing low) — these define the current active swing range. Position = (current price − LL) / (HH − LL). Divide into 3 sections.

zones.equilibrium: 40% to 60% — NO TRADE regardless of direction

location_analysis.hard_rule: Equilibrium = no trade. This is a hard filter, not a suggestion.

direction_analysis.method: Read Trend and Status directly from PxD Trend Engine v20 dashboard. Do not perform independent pivot analysis — trust v20 output entirely.

sideways.rule: If Trend = Sideways — no trade regardless of location. Hard stop.

direction_analysis.unconfirmed_note: Unconfirmed status on Daily does NOT require a liquidity grab check at the Daily level. Both Confirmed and Unconfirmed are valid if location aligns. Liquidity grab is only assessed on the 4H.

action_matrix.description: Location + Direction must be assessed before any trade. Confirmed and Unconfirmed treated equally at Daily level.
action_matrix.bullish_discount: Long — proceed to 4H entry rules regardless of Confirmed or Unconfirmed status
action_matrix.bearish_premium: Short — proceed to 4H entry rules regardless of Confirmed or Unconfirmed status

liquidity_grab_rules.definition: A sweep of a previous swing high or low followed immediately by a reversal — price takes out liquidity then rejects
liquidity_grab_rules.detection: Read LQ labels from data_get_pine_labels(study_filter='PxD Toolkit'). LQ label with arrow = confirmed liquidity grab event
liquidity_grab_rules.proximity_rule: LQ label must appear immediately BEFORE the most recent BOS or MSS being analyzed — not anywhere on the chart history
liquidity_grab_rules.with_trend_confirmed: Liquidity grab = odds enhancer only. Not mandatory. Adds confluence when present.
liquidity_grab_rules.counter_trend_4H: Liquidity grab = MANDATORY on 4H before the MSS that signals the flip back in line with Daily bias. No LQ label before MSS = no trade.
liquidity_grab_rules.hard_rule: Counter trend setup without LQ label before MSS = no trade. Non-negotiable.

counter_trend_logic.definition: 4H trend moving against the Daily bias — MSS on 4H signals anticipated flip back in line with Daily
counter_trend_logic.entry_1_MSS: Enter at Killshot after MSS confirmation — anticipatory, higher risk, grade drops one level automatically
counter_trend_logic.entry_2_BOS: Enter at Killshot after subsequent BOS confirmation — safer, more confirmation, full grade maintained
counter_trend_logic.invalidation_rule: Once subsequent BOS confirms in the same direction as MSS — MSS entry is invalidated. Only BOS entry remains valid.
counter_trend_logic.flag_requirement: Always flag counter trend setups in output as COUNTER TREND — ELEVATED RISK

swing_detection.source: PxD Toolkit indicator labels — HH, HL, LH, LL
swing_detection.daily_location: Use most recent HH as swing high and most recent LL as swing low to define current active leg for location calculation
swing_detection.4H_entry: Identify the most recent BOS or MSS on 4H. Fib the pivot that CREATED that structural break — always the most recent HH/LL pair that formed the impulsive leg. For bearish: HH = swing high, LL = swing low. For bullish: LL = swing low, HH = swing high.
swing_detection.confirmation: Always display detected swing high and swing low to user and request confirmation or override before calculating Killshot entry
swing_detection.hard_rule: Never proceed to entry calculation without user confirming swing levels

framework_OTE_entry.description: Killshot entry using 70.5% Fibonacci retracement of last impulsive leg on 4H. Single entry level — currently backtesting 78.6 separately.
framework_OTE_entry.fibonacci_measurement: Wick to wick — swing low wick to swing high wick

entry_formula.short: Entry = swing_low + 0.705 × (swing_high − swing_low). Fib drawn from swing HIGH down to swing LOW. 0% = swing low (TP1), 100% = swing high (SL). Entry at 70.5% counting UP from swing low.
entry_formula.long: Entry = swing_high − 0.705 × (swing_high − swing_low). Fib drawn from swing LOW up to swing HIGH. 0% = swing high (TP1), 100% = swing low (SL). Entry at 70.5% counting DOWN from swing high.

framework_OTE_entry.sl_placement: 100% Fibonacci level + ATR buffer. Longs: swing low wick − (ATR × 0.10). Shorts: swing high wick + (ATR × 0.10).
framework_OTE_entry.tp1: 0% Fibonacci level — swing low for shorts, swing high for longs
framework_OTE_entry.tp2: Next opposing 4H S&D zone beyond TP1

confluence_checklist.description: Assess all 4 in order. State each as confirmed or not confirmed.
confluence_checklist.1_location: Price in discount (longs) or premium (shorts) on Daily. Confirmed from Step 1.

2_liquidity_sweep.with_trend: LQ label present before impulse = odds enhancer. Not mandatory. State: present / absent.
2_liquidity_sweep.counter_trend: LQ label before MSS = MANDATORY. No LQ label = no trade.

3_bos_or_mss.with_trend: BOS confirmed on 4H — structural break in direction of Daily bias
3_bos_or_mss.counter_trend: MSS confirmed on 4H — market structure shift signaling flip back to Daily bias

confluence_checklist.4_imbalance: FVG present near entry. Bullish FVG: bar[i].low > bar[i-2].high. Bearish FVG: bar[i].high < bar[i-2].low. Or read directly from PxD Toolkit boxes (bgColor 1531263542 = imbalance box).

setup_grades.absolute_best: Small Brother (4H S&D zone) within OTE zone + all 4 confluence items confirmed
setup_grades.A_plus: All 4 confluence items confirmed + imbalance near entry (no Small Brother present)
setup_grades.A: With trend + BOS + retracing to 70.5% (no sweep, no Small Brother, no imbalance)
setup_grades.no_trade: Counter trend without mandatory LQ label before MSS
setup_grades.counter_trend_adjustment: Counter trend setup drops one grade automatically. Absolute Best → A+. A+ → A. A → no trade.

sd_confluence_check.description: S&D zones used as confluence only — not a separate entry framework
sd_confluence_check.4H_zones: Does a fresh 4H S&D zone align with or conflict with the Killshot entry level?
sd_confluence_check.daily_zones: Does a Daily S&D zone align with or conflict with the Killshot entry level?
sd_confluence_check.aligns: Zone at or near entry in direction of bias → adds confluence ✅
sd_confluence_check.in_path: Zone between entry and TP → potential obstacle ⚠️ — flag it, assess if TP adjustment needed
sd_confluence_check.conflicts: Entering into opposing zone → reduces probability or invalidates ❌
sd_confluence_check.freshness_detection: Read bgColor from data_get_pine_boxes(study_filter='Supply & Demand Pro', verbose=true). bgColor 2569935900 or 2586713116 = Fresh. bgColor 858659868 = Touched. bgColor null = inactive, ignore.

big_brother_small_brother.big_brother: Daily S&D zone — provides HTF confluence context for Killshot entry
big_brother_small_brother.small_brother: 4H S&D zone — must fall within or near the Killshot entry level to count as confluence
big_brother_small_brother.rule: Small Brother within OTE zone = highest grade confluence. Small Brother in path = obstacle warning.

indicator_tags.description: S&D Pro indicator plots zones automatically on TradingView. Read tags directly.

tags.timeframe: Timeframe of the zone — Daily or 4H
tags.formation: Zone formation type — RBD, RBR, DBR, DBD
tags.F: Flip zone — new demand in area of original supply or new supply in area of original demand. NOT freshness.
tags.O: Original zone — not caused by a reaction to another zone to its left
tags.LoL: Level on Top of Level — two zones stacked with gap smaller than either zone

freshness_detection.method: Read bgColor from data_get_pine_boxes(study_filter='Supply & Demand Pro', verbose=true)
freshness_detection.fresh: bgColor 2569935900 or 2586713116 = Fresh (untouched) — both supply and demand use same base color #1c1c2e at 60% opacity
freshness_detection.touched: bgColor 858659868 = Touched — same base color at 20% opacity
freshness_detection.inactive: bgColor null = historical/inactive zone — ignore entirely

indicator_tags.fallback: If indicator returns no data, fall back to structural price analysis and flag as approximate.

risk_rules.max_open_positions: No fixed limit — trades can be entered on different days and run concurrently. Practical ceiling is ~4 open at once.
risk_rules.daily_stop_rule: Stop trading after 2 consecutive losing trades on the same day, OR when FTMO daily drawdown limit is reached — whichever comes first.
risk_rules.sl_placement: 100% Fibonacci level + 10% of 4H ATR. Longs: swing low wick − (ATR × 0.10). Shorts: swing high wick + (ATR × 0.10).

notes: Killshot is the proprietary entry level at 70.5% fibonacci retracement — currently the only entry level while 78.6 is being backtested separately. HTF S&D zones are confluence tools only, not a separate entry framework. Confirmed and Unconfirmed Daily status are treated equally — no Daily liquidity grab check required. Liquidity grabs are only assessed on 4H: mandatory for counter trend setups, odds enhancer for with-trend setups. Counter trend setups enter at MSS (1st entry, higher risk, grade drops) or subsequent BOS (2nd entry, safer). MSS entry is invalidated once subsequent BOS confirms.
